trigger_queries.query: I have 6 features — user authentication, product catalog, checkout, order history, dashboard, and admin panel. Map their dependencies and tell me what order to build them.
assertions: Produces a topological delivery wave plan

trigger_queries.query: My checkout feature depends on payment processing, payment processing depends on transaction logging, and transaction logging depends on checkout. Is this a problem?
assertions: Offers resolution options (merge, extract, break weakest edge)
Blocks further analysis until cycle is resolved

trigger_queries.query: We need to change the user authentication module. Which other features will be affected, and how badly?
Design the checkout feature for me.
assertions: Does not apply ecosystem analysis to single feature
States that ecosystem design requires 2+ features

trigger_queries.query: What npm packages does our React app depend on?
assertions: Does not build a feature dependency graph for package questions

trigger_queries.query: Dashboard is owned by Frontend Team and Analytics is owned by Data Team. Dashboard needs metrics from Analytics. Design the contract between them.
assertions: Designs contract with version, provider API, consumer API
Includes error contract, SLA, and change protocol

stacked_scenario.prompt: We have 8 interdependent features ready for planning. Design the ecosystem (dependencies, waves, contracts) and then set up the orchestrated delivery.
expected_behavior: hm-feature-ecosystem builds dependency graph, validates, orders features into waves
hm-phase-execution consumes the wave plan for orchestrated multi-feature delivery
failure_signals: Implementation begins before ecosystem is validated
Waves contain features with unresolved dependencies
